description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsDark green shirt, has a spread collar, buttoned tabs on the shoulders, full buttoned placket with a flap to conceal it, except the top button, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, two patch pockets on the chest with a flap buttoned closure and pleat detail, a single box pleat from below the yoke through centre back and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care80% polyester and 20% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
